presentation.latex: t = [at, at+1, ..., at+H−1], then Aτ ∗ t is segmented into K := H/h sub-action chunks { ˜At, ˜At+h, . . . , ˜At+(K−1)h} with a horizon of h. The System 1 sequentially performs cascaded denoising on these sub-action chunks with observation ˜ot+kh. Note that System 1 is much faster than System 2, so that System 1 could finish cascaded denoising on all sub-action chunks before next action chunk Aτ ∗
